{{Quote|I believe it's safe to say that ''nothing'' caught between the conductor towers can ''survive--'' not when we generate the ''omega frost,'' my dear brother.|Silas Tagge|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 32">[[Star Wars (1977) 32|''Star Wars'' (1977) 32]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars 32: The Jawa Express''''' is the thirty-second issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] are stranded in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] after fleeing Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] from [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. They arrange a deal with some [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] to travel with them in their [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]], and soon discover further evidence of the plans of the [[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]] working in concert with the Empire to create a long range freezing mechanism, but the purpose of the technology still remains a mystery to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. The Rebels elude their Imperial pursuers and head back to Mos Eisley.
